user.title: Eldes Gate
user.description: Sign in with the credentials you use in the official Eldes Gates mobile app.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-enter Eldes password
reauth_confirm.description: Your saved password is no longer accepted by the server.

error.invalid_auth: The phone or password is wrong.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Eldes API. Check your network and try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the Home Assistant log for details.

abort.already_configured: This Eldes account is already configured.

open.name: Open gate
open.description: Send an open command and wait for controller confirmation.

output.name: Output
output.description: Output number, control name, or zone name.

timeout.name: Timeout (s)
timeout.description: Max seconds to wait for confirmation.

refresh.name: Refresh devices
refresh.description: Force a refresh of the device list.
